meaning: n.交通,通行,运输,贸易,交通量,交易,交往,通信量vi.交易,买卖vt.在...通行,用...作交换
examples: Air traffic had returned to normal.
Coordinating airline traffic on the ground is as complicated as managing the traffic in the air.
Common concerns about keeping a city up all night relate to noise, traffic and alcohol consumption.
"This is an historic day for marine conservation, " said Glenn Sant from Traffic International.
